name: Sweet'n Sour Chicken (Crock Pot)
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
4 Chicken breasts (about 3 lb), skinned and halved
17 oz Can water-packed peaches, sliced, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced potatoes in the Crock-Pot.
2. Arrange the chicken breasts on top of the potatoes.
3. In a small bowl, combine orange juice, brown sugar, basil leaves, nutmeg, and vinegar.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle the chicken with dried parsley flakes.
6. Cover and cook on Low setting for 6 to 8 hours.
7. Remove the chicken breasts and potatoes from the sauce and arrange them on a warm platter.
8. Turn the Crock-Pot to High setting.
9. Add peach slices to the sauce.
10. Heat until serving temperature.
11. Pour the sauce over the chicken and potatoes.
12. Garnish with chopped parsley.
Makes 8 servings (162 calories per serving).
